name: resample
description: Resample to fixed 1s grid with forward-fill for small gaps, NaN for large gaps
output_format: Parquet files on regular time grid: `<source>__<domain>__<YYYY-MM-DD>.parquet`

freq.description: Target resampling frequency (pandas offset alias, e.g. 1s, 500ms)

max_gap_fill_s.description: Maximum gap (in seconds) to forward-fill. Larger gaps become NaN.

agg_method.description: Per-domain aggregation method when multiple raw samples fall in the same target bin (nearest, mean, first, last)
